properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v1 v3 v4 v5 v5 v6

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Holy, holy are You Lord The whole earth is filled with Your glory Let the nations rise to give Honor and praise to Your name

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Let Your face shine on us And the world will know You live All the heavens shout Your praise Beautiful is our God, the universe will sing Hallelujah to You our King Church sing holy

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Let Your face shine on us And the world will know You live All the heavens shout Your praise Beautiful is our God, the universe will sing Hallelujah to You our King

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Let Your face shine on us And the world will know You live

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: All the heavens shout Your praise Beautiful is our God, the universe will sing Hallelujah to You our King

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Hallelujah to You our King Hallelujah to You our King Hallelujah Lord
